identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a B2B CRM that feels like a Swiss watch—precise, clean, and functionally beautiful. Reject generic 'SaaS Blue' gradients. Embrace high-contrast typography and density.
identity.tone: Professional, Efficient, Trusted, Minimalist, Corporate (Light Theme)

page_shell.header_spacing: px-8 py-6 border-b border-border bg-background/50 backdrop-blur-sm sticky top-0 z-10

buttons.default: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input text-foreground hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground shadow-sm

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

tables.wrapper: rounded-md border border-border bg-white overflow-hidden shadow-sm
tables.header_cell: h-10 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground [&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/70 border-white/20 (Use for sticky headers)

icons.usage: Use icons to support text labels, rarely alone. Use for actions (edit, delete, view) in tables.

images.strategy: Minimal use of images. Use generous whitespace and typography instead.
images.placeholder_logo: Use a text-based logo with a simple geometric shape (e.g., a square with a letter) if no image is provided.
images.login_background: Split screen. Left side: Login Form (White). Right side: Branding/Art (Subtle Slate/Blue Pattern or solid color #0F172A). Avoid stock photos of handshakes.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use generic 'SaaS Blue' gradients. Stick to solid, confident colors.
Density is okay for CRM. Don't waste space, but keep it legible.
Tables are the primary interface. Make them beautiful.
Use 'Public Sans' for all headings. 'Inter' for body.
All text must be in Spanish.
Do not center align main content. Use 'max-w-[1600px] mx-auto'.
Dark mode is NOT supported. Optimize for Light mode only.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the font imports in 'index.css' immediately.
2. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the new font families and color palette.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that implements the Dashboard Shell (Sidebar + Header).
4. Build the 'Login' page first to establish the design language.
6. When building tables, use the 'Table' component from shadcn/ui but apply the custom styles defined in 'components.tables'.
